nonBlockingIssues.description: collect_browser_mdns_seeds() only browses _codex._tcp. services, never _agent._tcp. even though classification logic accepts them.
GenericAcp returns None from agent_binary_name(), meaning no binary validation occurs for GenericAcp agents in the provider path. May be intentional (remote_command pattern) but is undocumented.
Comment at ssh.rs:1043 still calls the renamed steps 'Codex-specific' even though names are now generic. Cosmetic only.
ManualConnectionMode.codex enum case retains 'codex' name — intentional since it refers to Codex WebSocket protocol specifically, but could be renamed for full consistency.
The empty-classification guard `if !classified.is_empty()` preserves stale agent_types in the unlikely edge case of all unregistered ports after merge.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add canonical connection mode string names: specify that the preferred connection mode should be stored as "direct" (not "directCodex" or "directAgent") across all platforms. Rust, iOS, and Android should all agree on the canonical string value. The current split (Rust: is_direct_mode() accepts both, Android: migrates to "direct", iOS: .directAgent enum) works but should converge on one canonical string.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: discovery-milestone-build-gate review found reconnect.rs:178 checks "directCodex" while Android migrates to "direct" and iOS uses enum .directAgent. The fix (discovery-scrutiny-fixes) added is_direct_mode() accepting both, but long-term convergence is still needed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the SSH method hierarchy: ssh_connect_only() (generic, no agent install) → ssh_connect_and_bootstrap() (Codex-only, includes binary resolution and install) → connect_remote_over_ssh_with_agent_type() (agent-type-aware routing). Also document the is_non_codex_agent routing function and the two-path design (guided vs provider).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ssh-bootstrap-agent-separation review noted these are key architectural decisions not documented anywhere.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the AGENT_PORT_REGISTRY pattern and the requirement to add entries for new AgentType variants. Future workers adding new agent types need to know this registry exists and must be updated.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: agent-aware-discovery-config review noted the registry is not documented in any library file.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker did not add new tests for rust-discovery-field-rename (pure rename).
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — reviewer noted this is a reasonable deviation since 1250 existing tests exercise all renamed fields

rejectedObservations.observation: platform-ui-worker skill doesn't document the full verification procedure (rust-test, ios-sim-fast, xcodebuild test, rg checks).
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous — skill is scoped to agent picker wiring, not build gates. Worker improvised correctly. Skill procedure is adequate for its stated scope.
